endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Automation/automationAccounts/{automationAccountName}/sourceControls/{sourceControlName}/sourceControlSyncJobs
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of source control sync jobs.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{AUTOMATIONACCOUNTNAME}} with a real automationaccountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SOURCECONTROLNAME}} with a real sourcecontrolname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Automation/automationAccounts/{automationAccountName}/sourceControls/{sourceControlName}/sourceControlSyncJobs/{sourceControlSyncJobId}
endpoints.description: Retrieve the source control sync job identified by job id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{AUTOMATIONACCOUNTNAME}} with a real automationaccountname. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SOURCECONTROLNAME}} with a real sourcecontrolname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SOURCECONTROLSYNCJOBID}} with a real sourcecontrolsyncjobid.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Automation/automationAccounts/{automationAccountName}/sourceControls/{sourceControlName}/sourceControlSyncJobs/{sourceControlSyncJobId}
endpoints.description: Creates the sync job for a source control.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{AUTOMATIONACCOUNTNAME}} with a real automationaccountname. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SOURCECONTROLNAME}} with a real sourcecontrolname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SOURCECONTROLSYNCJOBID}} with a real sourcecontrolsyncjobid.
